title: Front Office Manager - Six Senses India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Six Senses India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at Six Senses India are looking for an experienced Front Office Manager based out of Kanpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Six Senses India:
Six Senses India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Six Senses India!
